summary: Frontend-only regression test of Method marketing site footer changes (iteration 2). All 34 assertions across 9 review scenarios passed. Footer wordmark is now visually restrained (64px desktop / 40px mobile, down from ~120px). New LinkedIn link with correct href/target/rel is present. All previously-passing checks (nav, routing, testids, mailto, no-forms, Save as PDF triggers window.print) continue to pass. Zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Footer.jsx: wordmark uses text-[2.5rem] md:text-[3.25rem] lg:text-[4rem] — computed 40/52/64px which is well under the 72px cap. Good.
Footer.jsx: LinkedIn <a> has href, target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer, and data-testid=footer-linkedin-link — spec exactly met.
Previously-noted issues from iteration_1 (Nav.jsx dead useEffect with empty deps, App.js catch-all falls back to Home instead of proper 404) still present and unaddressed. Non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 verified footer redesign: wordmark 40px mobile / 52px tablet / 64px desktop (Tailwind text-[2.5rem] md:text-[3.25rem] lg:text-[4rem]). LinkedIn link testid=footer-linkedin-link, correct href/target=_blank/rel=noopener noreferrer. Email link, all 5 footer-link nav items, Save as PDF (window.print on click) all confirmed working. Footer still absent from /connect (per spec). Writing index still lists 8 posts, Work index still lists 2 cards. No forms/inputs anywhere. No horizontal overflow on 390x844 mobile viewport. Frontend URL: https://method-positioning.preview.emergentagent.com
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found; all iteration 2 acceptance criteria met.
